userText: We have to put the code verification in place before regular publish.
correctedText: We have to put code verification in place before every release.

issues.note: 'the code verification' → 'code verification'; abstract process/concept nouns don't need 'the' unless referring to a specific known one
issues.suggestion: No article before general abstract processes: code verification, user authentication, error handling

issues.note: 'regular publish' → 'every release'; in software, 'publish' is a verb (publish an article/package), not a count noun; the natural noun is 'release' or 'deployment'
issues.suggestion: Software vocabulary: release (noun/verb), deployment, ship/shipping — not 'publish' as a noun for code releases
